zh.lifeSummary: 當William Adams於大約1454年出生在英國坎布利其爾德 聖 基路士時，他的父親Sir William Adams Sr31歲，母親Alice Herbert27歲。他於大約1485年與Maude Perrott在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1500年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Salvatore, Giuseppe, Santo, Giovanna, Nicola, Aldo, Baldassare, Carmelo, Carmino.
Italian: from the personal name Adamo, the Italian form of Adam .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Adams was born about 1454, in Tydd St Giles, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Sir William Adams Sr, was 31 and his mother, Alice Herbert, was 27. He married Maude Perrott about 1485, in Pembroke St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1500, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

Il a épousé Maude Perrott environ 1485, à Pembroke St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1500, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Adamsが約1454年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアトイッド スト ギレスで生まれた時，父Sir William Adams Srは31歳，母Alice Herbertは27歳であった。約1485年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロク スト マリーでMaude Perrottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1500年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Adams(이)가 대략 1454년 영국 캄브리지실르 타이드 스트 자일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Adams Sr(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Herbert(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1485년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크 스트 메리에서 Maude Perrott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Penfro, Pembrokeshire, Wales: пемброк ст мэри, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Adams родился около 1454 г. в местности тидд ст джилесь, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Adams Sr было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Herbert, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude Perrott около 1485 г. в местности пемброк ст мэри, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1500 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.
